hyperedges.label: CI quality gates: lint + tests + coverage + version-check
Vite build -> Pages artifact -> GitHub Pages deploy
PWA/Excel <-> doPost <-> _ImportGS Sheet sync flow
hyperedges.source_file: C:\Users\fdaub\Documents\Github\suivi-conso-carburant\Google Drive\Sauvegarde & Geolocalisation - Suivi conso SuperEthanol\Google Apps Script\GAS_UPDATE.md

hyperedges.label: Scan ticket: Gemini principal + repli Tesseract OCR + stockage Drive
Sync bidirectionnelle Excel <-> GAS <-> Google Sheets via sync_id
Relevé prix quotidien -> _PrixHistory -> alerte Web Push
CI pipeline: ESLint + Vitest + Playwright + npm audit
Commit workflow: commit.sh + commitMe command + settings auto-push hook
GAS deploy pipeline: gas-deploy.mjs + gas-config.json + skill gas-api + gasManager command
VBA Agent skill: Python driver + form spec + setup guide enabling Claude to edit Excel VBA via COM
Excel dashboard button assets: PowerShell generator produces PNG buttons used in Graphiques sheet
Z900 photo wallpaper variants: source photos processed into light/medium/color faded versions for Excel background
Flux U7 — Auth Google : initAuth → GIS JWT → session → auth-changed → main.js reload perso
Architecture carte duale — showMap() orchestrant Google Maps (gmaprender) ou repli OSM
Sélection station géolocalisée — geolocate → searchNearby → pickStation → formulaire
Offline sync queue flow — queuePlein, syncQueue, state, ui
Price display pipeline — fetchPricesAtCoords, applyPricesResult, state, ui fields
Historical price form fill — secteur loadSectorPrices, resolveHistPrice, applyHistPriceToForm, ui
Chaîne de synchronisation Excel ↔ GAS ↔ Google Sheets via Power Query GS_Pleins + PrixHistory
Infrastructure PWA offline : manifest + service worker + icône
Bilan annuel Wrapped : buildWrapped + computeSurconso + renderWrapped + initWrapped
E2E test suite (Playwright) — mock GAS, prix, overpass, gsheets, 5 scenarios
Vitest unit test suite covering all JS modules with jsdom/node environments
Historical price resolution flow: secteur.js → resolveHistPrice → applyHistPriceToForm, covered by both unit and E2E tests
statsApi test suite covers cache and URL building
ticket.test.js covers parseOCRText across all field types
ui.test.js covers DOM helpers with jsdom environment
utils.test.js covers pure functions (no DOM, no fetch)
